1001.name: Rusty Shortsword
1001.description: A battered shortsword with a chipped blade. It's seen better days, but it's still sharp enough to cut.

1002.name: Leather Cap
1002.description: A simple leather cap that offers minimal protection. Better than nothing.

1003.name: Moonstone Shard
1003.description: A fragment of pale blue stone that glows faintly in darkness. It pulses when held near the standing stones.

1004.name: Spider Silk Bundle
1004.description: A tightly wound bundle of incredibly strong spider silk. Could be useful for crafting or trade.

1005.name: Handful of Coins
1005.description: A small pouch of mixed coins — copper, silver, and a single gold piece.

1006.name: Healing Herb
1006.description: A bundle of dried herbs known for their restorative properties. Chewing them restores a small amount of health.

1007.name: Wolf Pelt
1007.description: A thick wolf pelt, still warm. It could be sold or crafted into something useful.

1008.name: Crude Knife
1008.description: A goblin-made knife. It's ugly and poorly balanced, but surprisingly sharp.

1009.name: Shadow Essence
1009.description: A vial of condensed darkness. It writhes inside the glass like a living thing. Valuable to the right buyer.

1010.name: Venom Sac
1010.description: A bulbous sac of spider venom. Handle with extreme care. Alchemists pay well for these.
